en: But my heart just can't hold back
ko: 하지만 내 마음은 참을 수 없어
ja: でも心が抑えられない
vi: Nhung trai tim toi khong the kiem che

en: It's the way you make me feel The way that you make me feel
ja: 君が感じさせてくれるもの
vi: Cach ma ban lam toi cam nhan
Lam quay the gioi cua toi

en: Tell me, how can I walk away?
ja: どうやって離れられる?
vi: Hay noi toi, lam sao toi co the buoc di

en: I don't care what they say I'm loving you anyway
ja: 他人の言葉は気にしない
vi: Toi khong quan tam ho noi gi

en: It's the way you make me feel
ja: 君に感じるこの気持ち
vi: La cach ban lam toi cam thay

en: I'm gonna make you mine It's not impossible
vi: Toi se lam ban thuoc ve toi

en: Got to let you know I can't resist the fall

vi: Em yeu, em khong thay sao
Em la nguoi danh cho toi

ja: でも君は他の人のもの
vi: Nhung em thuoc ve nguoi khac
Toi khong muon lam ton thuong ai
